pcos.title: PCOS
pcos.subtitle: Risk Checker
pcos.desc: Select symptoms you experience regularly to assess your PCOS risk
pcos.disclaimer_text: This tool is for awareness only — not a medical diagnosis. A gynecologist can confirm PCOS through blood tests and ultrasound.
pcos.risk_low: Low risk. Keep monitoring your cycle health.
pcos.risk_mod: Moderate risk. Consider discussing this with a gynecologist.
pcos.risk_high: High risk. We strongly recommend a consultation with a gynecologist soon.
pcos.risk_empty: Select symptoms above to see your risk level.

breast.title: Breast
breast.subtitle: Health
breast.desc: Guide for regular self-checks and risk evaluation
breast.disclaimer_text: This tool is not a diagnosis. Breast cancer can only be diagnosed by a medical professional through imaging (mammogram/ultrasound) and biopsy. If you find a lump, do not panic, but please see a doctor.
breast.step1_text: Keep your shoulders straight and arms on your hips. Look for changes in size, shape, color, or any dimpling/puckering of the skin.
breast.step2_text: Raise your arms high and look for the same changes. Also, check for any signs of fluid coming out of one or both nipples.
breast.step3_text: Use your right hand to feel your left breast, then vice versa. Use a firm, smooth touch with the first few finger pads.
breast.checklist_sub: Select any signs or changes you have noticed recently:
breast.note_low: No significant risk factors selected. Continue regular self-exams.
breast.note_mod: You have selected some concerning symptoms. It is recommended to consult a doctor.
breast.note_high: High priority alert! These symptoms require prompt medical evaluation. Please see a specialist immediately.
breast.item1: A painless, hard lump or thickening
breast.item2: Changes in breast size or shape
breast.item3: Dimpling or puckering of the skin (orange peel texture)
breast.item6: Redness, flaking, or scaling on the nipple or breast skin
breast.item7: Swelling or lump in the armpit or around collarbone
breast.item8: Constant pain in one part of the breast or armpit

history.confirm_clear: This will delete all your health data. Are you sure?

chatbot.title: Gauri AI Assistant
chatbot.desc: Ask questions about your health, get insights from your logged data, and receive personalized recommendations.

chatbot.error: I'm sorry, I encountered an error while trying to process your request. Please try again later.
